response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with demonstrated full-stack capabilities across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB. Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), directly matching a key requirement. Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligns with the engineering culture implied by the stack. Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java depth, and explicit cloud/Kubernetes production experience, but the breadth and trajectory are strong.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB matching primary stack
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks)
Strong testing and craftsmanship discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (robotics/mobile orchestration pre-2018)
Limited explicit cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK; Kubernetes mentioned only for self-hosted deployments
